task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenProject interface shows 'E-Commerce Platform' in the top navigation bar, project selector, or project header.

task_completion.description: Access the Wiki section of the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Wiki' menu item is highlighted in the left sidebar, or the main content area displays the Wiki creation/viewing interface.

task_completion.description: Set the wiki page title to 'Architecture Overview'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title input field contains exactly 'Architecture Overview', or the rendered page header displays this title.

task_completion.description: Enter the 'System Architecture' section and its components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor or rendered page contains the heading 'System Architecture' followed by the bulleted list of components (Frontend, API Gateway, Order Service, Inventory Service).
The text editor or rendered page contains the heading 'Deployment' followed by the text stating 'All services are containerized with Docker and orchestrated via Kubernetes.'

task_completion.description: Save or publish the new wiki page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wiki page is shown in view mode (not edit mode) with the correct title and rendered markdown content, or a success notification indicating the page was created is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenProject web GUI to create the wiki page.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is visible showing the OpenProject interface, rather than a terminal window executing API or database commands.

integrity.description: The agent entered the content into the actual OpenProject application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is typed into the OpenProject Wiki editor, not a separate local text editor like Notepad, gedit, or VS Code.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing curl commands, python scripts, or direct database queries related to wiki creation.
